mapper.sql: SELECT ID, USER_ACCOUNT, USER_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_ID, MENU_ROUTER, SORT_NUM, DATA_TYPE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM sys_custom_region where USER_ID = #{loginUserId} AND DATA_TYPE = 'PC'
mapper.select: SELECT A.id as menu_id, A.menu_name, A.parent_id, A.order_num, A.path, A.component, A.query, A.is_frame, A.is_cache, A.menu_type, A.visible, A.status, A.data_type, A.icon_app, DECODE(A.status, '0', '正常', '停用') as statusLabel, nvl(perms, '') as perms, A.icon, A.create_time, A.LINK, A.APP_TYPE FROM SYS_MENU A, SYS_ROLE_MENU B, SYS_ROLE_USER C, SYS_CUSTOM_REGION D where C.USER_ID = #{loginUserId} AND C.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID AND B.MENU_ID = A.ID AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'APP' AND A.ID = D.MENU_ID AND A.status = 0 AND A.ID IN ( SELECT MENU_ID FROM sys_custom_region where USER_ID = #{loginUserId} and DATA_TYPE = 'APP' ) ORDER BY D.CREATE_TIME ASC

SELECT ID, USER_ACCOUNT, USER_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_ID, SORT_NUM, DATA_TYPE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM sys_custom_region
id = #{id}

SELECT A.id as menu_id, A.menu_name, A.parent_id, A.order_num, A.path, A.component, A.query, A.is_frame, A.is_cache, A.menu_type, A.visible, A.status, A.data_type, A.icon_app, A.MENU_ICON_COLOR as menuIconColor, DECODE(A.status, '0', '正常', '停用') as statusLabel, nvl(perms, '') as perms, A.icon, A.create_time, A.LINK
FROM SYS_MENU A, SYS_ROLE_MENU B, SYS_ROLE_USER C, SYS_CUSTOM_REGION D where C.USER_ID = #{loginUserId} AND C.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID AND B.MENU_ID = A.ID AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'APP' AND A.ID = D.MENU_ID AND A.status = 0 AND A.ID IN ( SELECT MENU_ID FROM sys_custom_region where USER_ID = #{loginUserId} and DATA_TYPE = 'APP' ) ORDER BY D.CREATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_custom_region( ID, USER_ACCOUNT, USER_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_ID, MENU_ROUTER, SORT_NUM, DATA_TYPE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuRouter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )

INSERT INTO sys_custom_region( ID, USER_ACCOUNT, USER_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_ID, MENU_ROUTER, SORT_NUM, DATA_TYPE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES
( #{item.id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.menuId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.menuRouter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sortNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_custom_region SET USER_ACCOUNT = #{userAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_NAME = #{menuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_ROUTER = #{menuRouter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATA_TYPE = #{item.dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
